title: rubus tomentosus var. eglandulosus
intro: Rubus tomentosus var. eglandulosus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan wild raspberry, is a variety of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the Himalayas. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Rubus tomentosus var. eglandulosus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Rubus tomentosus var. eglandulosus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
